name: candidate_mapping_overlaps_zero_size

proof fn phi_5_candidate_mapping_overlaps_zero_size(mappings: Map<nat, PTE>, base: nat, pte: PTE)
    requires
        mappings.contains_key(base),
        pte.frame.size == 0,
        mappings[base].frame.size == 0,
    ensures
        candidate_mapping_overlaps_existing_vmem(mappings, base, pte),
{
}
reason: Zero-size mappings at the same base are detected as overlapping — `overlap` triggers on `region1.base == region2.base` regardless of size, potentially blocking insertion of empty/sentinel mappings
